nasb.text: even though these three men, Noah, Daniel and Job were in its midst, by their own righteousness they could only deliver themselves,” declares the Lord God.

esv.text: even if these three men, Noah, Daniel, and Job, were in it, they would deliver but their own lives by their righteousness, declares the Lord God.

cnv.text: 即使有挪亞、但以理和約伯這三個人，他們也只能因自己的義救自己的性命。這是主耶和華的宣告。

ccb.text: 即使挪亚、但以理和约伯三人在那里，他们也只能因义行而自己得救。这是主耶和华说的。
